name: Rust Halter-Neck Dress with High Slit
why: The warm rust color is gorgeous — it's that 'brown sugar' tone that's everywhere in K-fashion right now. The halter neck and high slit give it movement and drama. I love the idea of wearing this to a summer festival or a dinner date. The draped cowl neck detail adds softness. This is the kind of dress that photographs beautifully in golden hour light.
